creator: hecker@hco.de
text:
HECKER CONSULTING (https://www.hco.de)

Our comprehensive portfolio includes a wide range of services, such as individual coaching, team training, and extensive professional development packages for entire organizations. We offer training and consulting for different Open Source systems including FreeBSD (https://www.hco.de/leistungen/freebsd-einstieg-beratung-coaching-workshop-training). For further details, please visit https://www.hco.de or contact us via mail info@hco.de.
